reviews.comment:
Es la única  estación  YPF de la ciudad, todos los playeros son muy amables y atentos. El full , es chico y hay poca variedad de   comidas, pero tiene un buen café con medias  lunas,tostados y empanadas. Todo el personal que atiende  es extremadamente amable .

(Translated by Google)
It's the only YPF station in the city, and all the attendants are very friendly and attentive. The station is small and offers limited food variety, but it has good coffee with croissants, toasted sandwiches, and empanadas. The entire staff is extremely friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCak5mN2Z3EAE

reviews.comment:
Los playeros exelentes pero la estacion de servicio un desastre, se hacen filas de mas de 25 minutos x falta de personal, baños inmundos, haganla fuul no tienen nada, otra ypf vendria barbaro con otra mentalidad.

(Translated by Google)
The attendants are excellent, but the gas station is a disaster. There are lines of more than 25 minutes due to lack of staff, the bathrooms are filthy, they need to be fully staffed, they have nothing. Another YPF station would be great with a different mentality.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCcUxTVUtBEAE
